_note: Source of truth for resume generation. Experience is NEVER invented. Titles, dates, and wording confirmed by Graeson and cross-checked against his real 2023 resume (Resume-Gehringer-2023-1.pdf).

_conventions.contact_line: City + State only on the resume (no street address / zip).
_conventions.employment_gap: GM Lead ended Oct 2023 when GM closed the building/role; personal time + a few months of job searching before Gibson (Oct 2024). Reason is context only — do NOT print it on any resume; just present the dates.
_conventions.summary: Base template has no summary/objective section; go straight into Experience.
_conventions.skills_format: Single comma-separated line, not grouped categories (matches real resume).

education.detail: Information Sciences and Technology: Design and Development

experience.title: Software Engineer
notes: Front-end (HTML/JavaScript) and back-end (Java) development for PartLink.
Fixed UI bugs and Java back-end bugs; implemented new front-end and Java features.
Identified SQL issues/needs and coordinated database updates with the dedicated SQL/database team (SQL knowledge scoped to understanding Java's needs and coordinating changes).
Communicated across the database team, Project Manager, QA team, and manager.
Maintained and enhanced legacy web applications; onboarded and trained new developers; owned the process to update and deploy the application.
experience.data_relevance: SQL needs analysis and coordination with the database team.

experience.title: Quality Assurance Analyst on Techline Connect
notes: Wrote and executed functional test cases; ran regression tests.
Helped build the automation test suite as both an automation developer (Cactus) and the QA knowledge expert for the app.

First major project: overhauled the team's regression suite (originally 1,500 test cases) — removed duplicate, outdated, and non-viable tests, added cases needed for coverage, and rewrote all with clear steps.
Conducted defect triages; proficient in defect lifecycle management.
Created documentation used by the team to share existing and new information.
TechlineConnect is a vehicle service suite used by 90,000 technicians across 7,000 dealer locations worldwide.

experience.title: Lead Quality Assurance Analyst on Techline Connect
notes: Promoted to QA Lead for TechlineConnect (team of ~5); owned test case build-out, business-knowledge comprehension, test execution, and management of test resources.
Trained and assisted new team members across the entire project team.
Identified risks to the project and testing timeline and provided solutions to minimize risk.
Worked closely with business partners and developers across time zones to identify requirements and complete gap analysis.
Participated in backlog grooming and sprint planning; created and shared daily test status reports; coordinated bug review multiple times per week; reported to the Project Manager.
Led the project team's transition from Waterfall to Agile.
Created an internal utility to estimate testing timelines and allocate resources, adjustable by delivery date and project scope.

experience.title: Software Quality Engineer
experience.company_context: Supply chain consulting firm improving its Data Tools team.
notes: First and only QA at the firm; also brought Project Management experience and coordination to the team.
Introduced and ran task coordination in Azure DevOps; ran the daily standup.
Used AI as a software-development tool: created unit tests, built MCPs (minimal focus), built a unit test suite for a Next.js app.
Built Databricks workbooks focused on data evaluation (Great Expectations-style validation for Python applications) and documentation creation.
experience.data_relevance: HIGH — Databricks data evaluation, data-quality validation, documentation.

skills.resume_line_2023: Agile and Waterfall Project Life Cycles, Azure DevOps, Cactus, Sikuli, Microsoft Office, Oracle SQL Developer, Java, Communication, Time Management, Cross-Organization Collaboration, Detail-Oriented

phrasing_bank: Integrated business knowledge into test case development and execution
Worked closely with business partners and developers in various time zones to identify requirements and complete gap analysis
Created an internal utility to estimate testing timelines and allocate resources with the ability to adjust based on delivery dates and project scope
Optimized our testing processes and timeline by creating new test suites without losing scope
Worked with the Test Automation team in writing and improving the Automation code base
Conducted defect triages and provided knowledge in defect lifecycle management

software_qa.label: Software QA / Quality Analyst
software_qa.emphasis: QA leadership, test design/execution, automation, regression optimization, defect lifecycle, cross-functional coordination.

data_analyst.label: Data Analyst
data_analyst.emphasis: Gibson Databricks data evaluation/quality as the anchor; GM SQL coordination and data-needs analysis as supporting experience. Power BI mentioned but de-emphasized (low confidence).
